name: Plans Before Development
description: Software plans (PSAC, SDP, SVP, SCMP, SQAP) are established and approved before development of life-cycle data begins.
rationale: DO-178C Table A-1: the software planning process produces the software plans and standards that govern development and verification; these must precede development.

examples.fails: the required objective evidence is absent

source: RTCA DO-178C / EUROCAE ED-12C — Software Considerations in Airborne Systems and Equipment Certification; objectives per Annex A tables A-1 to A-10.
